summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CodingModule refactoring. All 10 critical issues addressed by main agent verified working: 1) Language switching resets code and reinitializes editor, 2) Backend accepts JSON body with proper validation, 3) Monaco editor respects theme (dark/light), 4) All useEffect hooks working correctly, 5) Edge cases handled with confirmation dialogs and disabled states. All 48 backend tests pass. Frontend UI tests pass.

issues: ESLint warnings for missing useEffect dependencies (lines 111, 120, 133) - not breaking but should be addressed for code quality

action_items: Minor: Fix ESLint warnings in CodingModule.js for missing useEffect dependencies
critical_code_review_comments: CodingModule.js has ESLint warnings for missing dependencies in useEffect hooks at lines 111, 120, 133 - these are intentional to prevent infinite loops but should use eslint-disable comments for clarity
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_coding_module.py - Created new test file for coding module endpoints (15 tests)
seed_data_creation: Test user already exists in database from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: CodingModule fully refactored and tested. All features working: language switching (Python/JavaScript/Java/C++), code submission with score/analysis/XP, theme switching (Monaco editor respects dark/light mode), Run Code button, Next Question navigation, confirmation dialog when switching languages with modified code. Code execution is MOCKED (returns simulated results by design for MVP).

language_switching.details: Python → JavaScript → Java → C++ → Python cycle tested. Code resets each time, editor reinitializes with new language template, toast notification appears

language_confirmation_dialog.details: Confirmation dialog appears when switching languages after modifying code. Both Cancel and Confirm work correctly

code_submission.details: Submit returns score (75%), analysis (passed_tests, total_tests, quality), XP earned (+10). Results displayed in UI with Tests Passed, Code Quality, Score, Feedback sections

empty_code_validation.details: Backend returns 400 with 'Code cannot be empty' for empty or whitespace-only code. Frontend shows toast error

invalid_language_validation.details: Backend returns 400 with 'Invalid language' for unsupported languages

theme_switching.details: Dark mode: rgb(2, 8, 23), Light mode: rgb(250, 250, 250). Monaco editor theme changes accordingly (vs-dark / light)

run_code.details: Run Code button shows loading state, executes code (MOCKED), displays output in Output tab with success toast

next_question.details: Next Question button appears after submission, navigates to next question (Question 2 of 5), code resets to new template

loading_states.details: Loading spinner shows during question fetch, buttons show 'Running...' and 'Submitting...' states

button_disabled_states.details: Run and Submit buttons are disabled during operations (running/submitting)

mocked_apis.code_execution: MOCKED - Returns simulated execution results (by design for MVP)
mocked_apis.test_case_evaluation: MOCKED - Returns mock test results (2/3 passed)
